theme_and_archetype.rationale: A geopolitical intelligence dashboard demands authority and precision. The dark theme acts as a command center, while the luxury/editorial typography (serifs for headings) separates it from standard 'tech-bro' SaaS dashboards.

headings.usage: Page titles, large metrics, editorial section headers

body.usage: Data tables, standard UI text, paragraphs

mono.usage: Tickers, AI scores, timestamps, small labels

spacing_and_layout.spacing_system: Generous spacing: p-6 or p-8 for main cards. gap-6 for grid layouts.

glassmorphism_protocol.classes: bg-white/[0.03] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] rounded-xl
glassmorphism_protocol.rules: Never use glassmorphism without the 1px inner border. Use pure solid colors if layered over complex text to preserve contrast.

components.commodity_cards: Glassmorphism cards. Layout: Header (Name + Icon), Body (Large Price + Sparkline Chart), Footer (AI Impact Score + 24h trend). Use JetBrains Mono for the tickers.
components.map_widget: React Leaflet container. Must have pointer-events auto for interactivity. Use 'CartoDB Dark Matter' tiles. Overlay SVG pulse animations for high-risk zones.
components.news_feed: Vertical scroll list. Each item: tiny thumbnail image, serif headline, mono timestamp. Minimal borders between items.
components.buttons: Avoid standard solid blue. Use editorial gold for primary action, or glass ghost buttons (hover:bg-white/10) for secondary.
components.charts: Recharts. Remove default cartesian grid axes lines. Use strokeOpacity=0.2 for grid. Tooltips must have glassmorphism background.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Cards: -translate-y-1 hover:bg-white/[0.06] transition-all duration-300. Buttons: scale-105.
motion_and_interaction.entrance_animations: Framer Motion. Stagger children with opacity 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0 over 0.4s ease-out.

media_urls.description: Earth from space, useful for global geopolitical summit news.
Oil rig at night, useful for energy/commodity news.
Cargo shipping containers, useful for trade/supply chain news.

accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='commodity-card-gold').
accessibility.contrast: Maintain 4.5:1 ratio. Text over images must have drop-shadow or dark gradients behind.

instructions_to_main_agent: Phase 1 execution: Build the main Dashboard page.
Set up Tailwind config with custom colors (background primary/secondary, accents).
Implement the 'Control Room' grid layout for the dashboard.
Build the Commodity Cards with Recharts sparklines and AI Impact Scores.
Integrate React Leaflet map with dark theme.
Create the News Feed component using the provided media URLs.
Ensure all components use standard .js/.jsx syntax as per the environment rules, avoiding .tsx extensions.
Apply Framer Motion for entrance animations.
Ensure glassmorphism is achieved using Tailwind backdrop-blur and rgba borders.
